items.summary: The New York Knicks are the NBA champions for the first time in 53 years after another comeback victory over the San Antonio Spurs.

items.title: McGinn strike beats Haiti as Scotland enjoy dream World Cup return
items.summary: Scotland claimed their first World Cup finals win since 1990 as they beat Haiti 1-0 in their Group C opener with John McGinn scoring the winner.
